violations.description: DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided. (Quat = 200 to 400 ppm)
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Small container of baking soda noted not properly labeled.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Bottom-inside 'Pepsi' cooler in front service area noted in need of cleaning. Handsink needs routine cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor walls and ceiling throughout facility noted in need of cleaning and repair. Three-compartment sink and handsink need recaulk to wall.
PREMISES (1 pts): Wet mop noted in sink.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): Employee noted working in prep area not properly restraining their hair.
